name: Ratio King
conditioned_path: ratio dynamics (replies vs likes on a post)
mechanic: A post's like-counter and reply-counter both climb automatically; tap the reply counter to pump replies and flip replies > likes to 'win the ratio' before likes outpace you.

name: Follower Flood
mechanic: Follow notifications stream up from the bottom; tap each to accept before it scrolls off-screen — every missed accept costs your follower total, which climbs toward a milestone.

name: Seen Wait
mechanic: Tap to send a DM, then watch the typing dots; the instant the 'seen' stamp flashes, tap to claim it — but tap BEFORE it appears and you've double-texted and lost the round.

name: View Spike
mechanic: Your stream's viewer counter jitters up and down in real time; tap BOOST only on a rising tick to bank viewers — tap on a falling tick and they leave. Catch the wave or watch it crash.

name: Comment Dogpile
mechanic: Comments scroll up the post; tap each comment's heart before it scrolls off — every missed heart turns the crowd against you and speeds the scroll up.

name: Duet Chain
mechanic: A beat plays under a looping clip; tap on each beat to attach your frame to the public remix chain — one mistimed tap and the chain snaps.

name: Verified Chase
mechanic: A checklist of criteria (profile pic, bio, posts, follower threshold) appears; tap each requirement into place in the right order before the review window closes to earn the blue check.

name: Leaderboard Climb
mechanic: A ranked list scrolls past; tap your row to climb past each name above you, but every tap costs more energy and rivals re-pass you the moment you hesitate.

name: Story Viewers
mechanic: After you post, viewer names stream into the viewer list; a target handle is hinted at the top — tap ONLY when your target appears in the flood. Wrong tap and they slip away.

name: Trend Hijack
mechanic: A hashtag's reach curve rises and falls; tap to jump on as it climbs, tap to jump off at the peak — stay on past the peak and your reach craters.

name: Boost Button
mechanic: Tap the BOOST button to pump reach into a post — each tap adds viewers but fills a shadowban meter; tap BANK to lock in reach before the meter trips and wipes everything.

name: Shadowban Roulette
conditioned_path: 'your video is being reviewed' / shadowban anxiety
mechanic: Posts sit in a 'reviewing…' state; tap CHECK to reveal status — but every check lowers your trust score. Check too often and the post goes shadowbanned forever.

name: Add Yours
mechanic: A prompt sticker names a theme; thumbnail frames scroll past fast — tap the frame that matches the theme to append it to the public chain. Wrong frame and the chain breaks.

name: Mention Dodge
mechanic: Your @handle gets flung into the conversation from both sides; tap to block each incoming mention before it sticks to your name — one that lands and the dogpile begins.

name: Viral Wave
mechanic: View count spins up fast; tap RIDE to multiply while it rises — the instant it peaks, STOP. One tap past the peak and the post crashes back to zero.

name: Badge Clear
mechanic: Notification badges stack up; tap to clear each one — but every clear spawns 1-3 new badges at random. Keep the badge at zero as long as you can.

name: Pinned Top
mechanic: Comments rise and sink in a live thread; tap to pin the one climbing hardest to the top before it falls — a successful pin earns the top-comment crown and points.

name: Repost Train
mechanic: A post rolls along a track of friend stations; tap each station to repost it forward — the chain counter grows, but miss a station and the train halts.

name: Poll Slider
mechanic: A slider sweeps 0-100% while a poll's target % drifts; tap to lock the slider exactly on the moving target to win the vote — overshoot or undershoot and you lose.

name: Suggested Dismiss
conditioned_path: 'Suggested for you' / People you may know
mechanic: Suggested profile cards slide in; tap to dismiss each one you DON'T know — but some are people you actually know and must keep. Wrong dismiss and you've burned a real contact.

name: Unfollow Cleanse
mechanic: A follower list drifts down; tap gently to unfollow each account and watch your follower count fall — the relief is the count going DOWN. Breath-paced, no timer.

name: Story Peace
mechanic: A full-screen story plays with NO viewer list and NO count — just the content fading gently frame to frame. The whole game is watching without checking who saw it.

name: Badge Sit
mechanic: Notification badges appear one by one — and you do NOTHING. Let them sit; each fades away on its own. Your score is how many you let dissolve without tapping.

name: Slow Likes
mechanic: Likes arrive on your post one at a time, slowly, with no action required — just watch the heart fill and the number tick. The discipline is to observe without refreshing.

name: Quiet Feed
mechanic: A feed scrolls where every like and view count is blurred to '???' and only resolves if you linger. The game is to scroll PAST each post before the numbers resolve — letting the comparison stay unseen.
